prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: db_1631 Product Type: CHISEL Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 7 Inch Carving Tool Hobby Craft Pick Curved Chisel Clay Ceramics Woodworking Description: Carve precisely with the 7" Carving Tool!

The 7" Carving Tool is a great addition to any tool collection. This pick is double ended, featuring a flat chisel as well as a curved pick. It is constructed of durable steel and is great for scooping, carving and chiseling many malleable substances.

Make sure to grab one of these before your next ceramics or woodworking hobby project!

Package Includes:
-(1) 7" Carving Tool Search Terms: wood working Features: - Length: 7" - Material: Steel - Double Ended - Ideal for Woodworking & Ceramics - Great for Precision Hobby & Craft Projects === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 7" Carving Tool Curved Chisel Woodworking

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 7 in Double Ended Curved Chisel

anthropic.title_differentiation: Double Ended, Steel Construction, Flat Chisel And Curved Pick, Precision Carving, Ceramics And Woodworking

openai.title_differentiation: Steel Construction, Flat And Curved Ends, Precision Carving, Woodworking, Ceramics, Hobby Craft Projects
